$comment: ServerTop LLM servers — copy to llm.json next to the app (Docker: mount as /app/llm.json) and restart. Each entry is an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (llama.cpp, vLLM, Ollama, custom). Probed every 15s: /v1/models gives up/latency/model/context; vanilla llama.cpp also reports busy slots via /slots; local servers get process CPU/memory via their listening port (needs lsof).
